---
title = "Software documentation"
---

*Calepin* can automatically extract documentation from `R` or `Python` code files and create a nice website to host your documentation. The steps are as follows.

First, install the package you want to document:

```sh
Rscript -e 'install.packages("countrycode", repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")'
```

Second, create a website scaffold using *Calepin*:

```sh
calepin new website countrycode_docs
```

Third, extract the documentation from the package:

```sh
calepin man r countrycode -o countrycode_docs/man
```

Fourth, add the documentation to the website structure, by editing `_calepin/config.yml`:

```toml
[[contents]]
text = "Function reference"
include = "man/**/*.qmd"
```

Finally, preview the website:

```sh
calepin preview countrycode_docs
```
